title: rosa pomifera subsp. mollis
intro: Rosa pomifera subsp. mollis, also known as the wild apple rose or Chinese apple rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa pomifera subsp. mollis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rosa pomifera subsp. mollis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
